title: Apple and Google ordered to purge 'nudify' apps from App Stores | TechCrunch
summary: The city of San Francisco has ordered Apple and Google to remove dozens of “nudify” apps — — software programs that can digitally alter pictures to unclothe the people in them — from their app stores.
caption: output/2026-07-17/apple-and-google-ordered-to-purge-nudify-apps-from-app-stores-techcrun.txt
